headline: YES BANK tops S&P Global CSA 2025 rankings, enhancing ESG credibility among Indian banks
what_matters: Possible minor P/E premium if sustained, but no immediate margin or revenue impact.
Aligns with BRSR, GRI, and DJSI frameworks; no regulatory penalties or deadlines triggered.
Potential for marginally improved cost of capital and eligibility for ESG fund inflows, but no immediate bond spread change.
